creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 175959
Deprecate security/py-pyme

The pyme bindings have been merged into the gpgme source and are being maintained there. See: https://www.gnupg.org/blog/20160921-python-bindings-for-gpgme.html

I have created security/py-gpgme for the new bindings, and I am suggesting deprecation of security/py-pyme since the two ports cannot coexist. Since no other ports depend on security/py-pyme, I recommend an EXPIRATION_DATE 30 days from now.
